name: TestWaitForLinHeader
title: TestWaitForLinHeader
description: Waits for the Header occurrence of the specified LIN frame. Should the header not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.
When no frame is specified the wait condition is resolved on any LIN header.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aFrame
parameters.description: Frame whose header should be awaited.
